creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-04-29 19:04:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/rubygem-rcov   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  rcov is (mainly) a code coverage tool for Ruby featuring fast execution
  (20-300 times faster than previous tools), multiple analysis modes,
  cross-referenced XHTML and several kinds of text reports, easy automation
  with Rake and Rant...
  
  WWW: http://rubyforge.org/projects/rcov/
  
  PR:             ports/122806
  Submitted by:   Steven Kreuzer
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3053    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/devel/rubygem-rcov/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-rcov/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-rcov/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +148 -0    ports/devel/rubygem-rcov/pkg-plist (new)
